supply_chain.dependencies: Single-source suppliers for certain customized parts including Intel and AMD as suppliers of certain x86 processors. Reliance on contract manufacturers and outsourced manufacturing. Concentration of manufacturing in certain geographic locations including Asia near major earthquake faults.
supply_chain.risks: Component shortages including GPUs and accelerated processing units. Supply chain constraints. Supplier transitions. Raw material or capacity constraints. Single-source supplier disruptions. Geopolitical tensions impacting supply chain. Natural disasters in manufacturing locations. Supplier financial instability. Long lead times for components.

regulatory_risks: Environmental regulations including product take-back legislation and repairability requirements
Climate change and emissions-related reporting requirements
Data privacy regulations including GDPR and various U.S. state laws
Tax law changes including OECD Pillar Two framework

sanction_risks: Russia and Ukraine conflict sanctions exposure
U.S. export controls and sanctions compliance
Restrictions on doing business in Russia and Belarus
